name: Baked Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the eggs and milk in a 13X9 inch baking dish.
2. Whisk together the eggs and milk and pour over the top.
3. Refrigerate overnight to serve tomorrow morning, or freeze the dish.
4. When thawed, bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 45 minutes.
Summary of processes:
grate: 3 cups mild cheese
chop: 1/4 cup green pepper, 1/2 cup onion
freeze in: 13X9 inch baking dish
serve with: sweet roll, grapefruit or orange slices
